slices.title: Notifications and cascade flows
slices.notes: Audited notifications/cascade surfaces. Fixed program diff + bundle cascades to join through event_people before notifying affectedPersonIds; added regression coverage; commit c85d2e4.

slices.title: RBAC and navigation entrypoints
slices.notes: Audited RBAC/navigation entrypoints. Locked feature-flags reads/page to Super Admin and filtered desktop/tablet sidebar items by role so Ops no longer see privileged admin routes; added regression coverage; commit 7939f65.

slices.title: Event isolation and cross-event leakage
slices.notes: Audited event-isolation surfaces. Fixed the public registration success flow so it resolves the event from the route slug and scopes registration lookup by eventId + registrationId, preventing cross-event confirmation/QR leakage; added regression coverage; commit f4bed9f.

slices.title: People merge and change history
slices.notes: Audited people merge/history. Fixed mergePeople so Event Coordinators cannot merge people whose linked records touch unassigned events; added regression coverage for the unauthorized cross-event merge path and revalidated people merge/history suites; commit pending.

slices.title: Public program visibility and published snapshots
Travel accommodation transport flags and audit logs
